001import java.awt.BorderLayout;
002import java.awt.Color;
003import java.awt.Dimension;
004import java.awt.Font;
005import javax.swing.BorderFactory;
006import javax.swing.JFrame;
007import javax.swing.JLabel;
008import javax.swing.JPanel;
009import javax.swing.JProgressBar;
010
011/**
012 * A splash screen displayed while the {@link AssetManager} downloads missing
013 * game assets from the remote server.
014 * <p>
015 * Shows a progress bar with a status label indicating which file is being
016 * downloaded and how many remain. When all downloads complete (or fail after
017 * retries), the screen closes automatically and the game starts.
018 * </p>
019 *
020 * @author Barnabe Jouanard
021 * @version 2026.04.17
022 */
023public class LoadingScreen {
024    /** The loading window frame. */
025    private JFrame aFrame;
026    /** Progress bar tracking download completion. */
027    private JProgressBar aProgressBar;
028    /** Label showing the name of the file currently being downloaded. */
029    private JLabel aStatusLabel;
030    /** Label showing the overall download count (e.g. "3 / 19"). */
031    private JLabel aCountLabel;
032    /** Reference to the asset manager performing the downloads. */
033    private AssetManager aAssetManager;
034
035    /**
036     * Creates a new loading screen linked to the given asset manager.
037     *
038     * @param pAssetManager the asset manager that will perform the downloads
039     */
040    public LoadingScreen(final AssetManager pAssetManager) {
041        this.aAssetManager = pAssetManager;
042        this.createGUI();
043    } // LoadingScreen()
044
045    /**
046     * Builds the loading screen UI: title, progress bar, and status labels.
047     */
048    private void createGUI() {
049        this.aFrame = new JFrame("Pokémon Delta Emerald — Loading");
050        this.aFrame.setDefaultCloseOperation(JFrame.EXIT_ON_CLOSE);
051        this.aFrame.setResizable(false);
052
053        JPanel vPanel = new JPanel();
054        vPanel.setLayout(new BorderLayout(10, 10));
055        vPanel.setBorder(BorderFactory.createEmptyBorder(30, 40, 30, 40));
056        vPanel.setBackground(new Color(30, 30, 40));
057
058        // Title
059        JLabel vTitle = new JLabel("Pokémon Delta Emerald", JLabel.CENTER);
060        vTitle.setFont(new Font("SansSerif", Font.BOLD, 50));
061        vTitle.setForeground(new Color(255, 215, 0));
062
063        // Progress bar
064        this.aProgressBar = new JProgressBar(0, 100);
065        this.aProgressBar.setStringPainted(true);
066        this.aProgressBar.setPreferredSize(new Dimension(400, 30));
067        this.aProgressBar.setForeground(new Color(76, 175, 80));
068        this.aProgressBar.setBackground(new Color(50, 50, 60));
069
070        // Status label
071        this.aStatusLabel = new JLabel("Checking assets...", JLabel.CENTER);
072        this.aStatusLabel.setFont(new Font("SansSerif", Font.PLAIN, 14));
073        this.aStatusLabel.setForeground(new Color(200, 200, 210));
074
075        // Count label
076        this.aCountLabel = new JLabel(" ", JLabel.CENTER);
077        this.aCountLabel.setFont(new Font("SansSerif", Font.PLAIN, 13));
078        this.aCountLabel.setForeground(new Color(160, 160, 170));
079
080        // Layout: south panel for labels
081        JPanel vSouthPanel = new JPanel();
082        vSouthPanel.setLayout(new BorderLayout(5, 5));
083        vSouthPanel.setOpaque(false);
084        vSouthPanel.add(this.aStatusLabel, BorderLayout.NORTH);
085        vSouthPanel.add(this.aCountLabel, BorderLayout.SOUTH);
086
087        vPanel.add(vTitle, BorderLayout.NORTH);
088        vPanel.add(this.aProgressBar, BorderLayout.CENTER);
089        vPanel.add(vSouthPanel, BorderLayout.SOUTH);
090
091        this.aFrame.getContentPane().add(vPanel);
092        this.aFrame.pack();
093        this.aFrame.setLocationRelativeTo(null);
094    } // createGUI()
095
096    /**
097     * Shows the loading screen.
098     * This method blocks until the download finishes (success or offline fallback).
099     */
100    public void startAndWait() {
101        this.aFrame.setVisible(true);
102        aAssetManager.downloadAssets();
103        while (aAssetManager.isComplete() == false) {
104            int vProgress = (int) (((double) aAssetManager.getCurrentProgress() / aAssetManager.getTotalAssets())
105                    * 100);
106            this.aProgressBar.setValue(vProgress);
107        }
108        if (aAssetManager.getErrorMessage() != null) {
109            aStatusLabel.setText(aAssetManager.getErrorMessage());
110            aCountLabel.setText("Starting in offline mode...");
111            try {
112                Thread.sleep(3000);
113            } catch (InterruptedException ignore) {
114            }
115            this.aFrame.setVisible(false);
116            this.aFrame.dispose();
117            return;
118        }
119        this.aProgressBar.setValue(100);
120        aStatusLabel.setText("All assets downloaded! Starting game...");
121        try {
122            Thread.sleep(2000);
123        } catch (InterruptedException ignore) {
124        }
125        this.aFrame.setVisible(false);
126        this.aFrame.dispose();
127    }
128} // LoadingScreen
